name: Python 3
updateContentCommand: [ -f packages.txt ] && sudo apt update && sudo apt upgrade -y && sudo apt install -y libgl1 && (sudo apt install -y libglib2.0-0t64 || sudo apt install -y libglib2.0-0); [ -f requirements.txt ] && pip3 install --user -r requirements.txt; pip3 install --user streamlit; echo '✅ Packages installed and Requirements met'
